title: Payload Mapper Evaluation Metrics Spec
description: Metric definitions and thresholds for the integration payload mapper eval harness

metrics.label: Exact Mapping Accuracy
metrics.description: Fraction of target fields where the suggested source path exactly matches the gold label

metrics.label: Missing Field Recall
metrics.description: Fraction of truly missing target fields that the mapper correctly identifies

metrics.label: Missing Field Precision
metrics.description: Fraction of mapper-flagged missing fields that are truly missing (not false positives)

metrics.label: Ambiguity Detection Recall
metrics.description: Fraction of truly ambiguous fields that the mapper correctly flags

metrics.label: Non-Hallucination Rate
metrics.description: Fraction of mapping suggestions where the source path actually exists in the payload

metrics.label: Correct Abstention Rate
metrics.description: Fraction of adversarial tasks where the mapper correctly returns an empty or minimal mapping

eval_set.description: Required for merge gate on standard eval set

adversarial_set.description: Required for merge gate on adversarial eval set

eval.description: Standard eval set; exact-match, missing-field, and ambiguity cases

adversarial.description: Adversarial set; unstable IDs, unknown mappings, alias collisions, type mismatches
